metadata.description: Clean initial PGMR-lite ACE playbook for mistral_7b_instruct / empirical_research_practice.

bullets.title: Use Empirical Research Practice contribution pattern
bullets.content: Always connect the paper to the contribution with ?paper pgmr:has_contribution ?contribution . and type the contribution as pgmrc:empirical_research_practice_contribution . Attach empirical template fields such as venue, research question, data collection, data analysis, validity threats, and variables to ?contribution or properly bound nested nodes.
bullets.avoid: Do not attach empirical template fields directly to ?paper except publication year.
bullets.applicability: All empirical research practice PGMR-lite queries.

bullets.title: Use full empirical nested paths
bullets.content: For empirical nested fields, first bind the parent node from ?contribution and then bind the requested child field. Examples: data collection questions use contribution -> data collection -> method/data; machine learning questions use contribution -> data analysis -> machine learning -> algorithm/metric; statistical test questions use contribution -> data analysis -> inferential statistics -> statistical tests.
bullets.avoid: Do not skip parent nodes when asking for nested empirical fields.
